text_preview:
*A retired military reports two sightings. One occurred in 1997 and the other in the late 1960s when he was still a cadet in the military school.*

The sighting in Curitiba in 1997

APRIL 19th, 1997. Time: 02h18 am. Duration: approximately 1 hour. A retired military residing in Curitiba, State of Paraná, reported that he observed an unidentified flying object in the form of “a horizontal line” with the luminous appearance of a star positioned East of the observer. “According to the observer, it was not necessarily a UFO, but an illumination in the celestial dome.” In the same way, according to
summary: Retired Army colonel reported a 1997 Curitiba sighting of a luminous horizontal-line UFO, and recalled a 1967-68 mass sighting at AMAN where a watchman fell into a coma.
